c.d: The variety and number of photo collage templates and layouts offered by the app for creative freedom.
The operating systems (iOS, Android, Web) on which the app is available.
Whether the app is free, freemium, or subscription-based, including trial availability.
Availability of advanced photo editing tools such as filters, text addition, background removal, and video collage support.
Presence of AI features like background removal and automatic collage generation that enhance usability.
How simple and intuitive the app interface is for users of different skill levels.
